text: Subcontractor is required to coordinate its daily work activities with all other subcontractors and vendors to sequence Subcontractor's Work so as to not interfere with or impede the work of others, or the Project Schedule. Installation of work in more than one area at a time may be required. Installation in completely open areas cleared of all other trades and all stored materials cannot be guaranteed. All subcontractors shall work closely with Contractor to coordinate the installation  of their work with the work of others. Out of sequence work may be required and is included in this Scope of Work. Subcontractor shall notify the Contractor in writing of any coordination conflicts with other subcontractors regarding layout, sequencing and installation of work. Subcontractor shall work with other affected trades to mutually resolve conflicts.
